case_title: EMMALYN S. MUNJAR VS. EVA D. RICHARDS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-15-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HELBRAUN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WAYNE RICHARDS WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
